title: Let me track that for you
expression: Let me track that for you

sentences.en: No, you are right. That package should have arrived by now.
sentences.ko: 맞습니다, 고객님. 그 소포는 지금쯤 도착했어야 해요.

sentences.en: ★ Let me track that for you.
Yep, these pants are awesome if you have hips.
sentences.ko: 네, 이 바지는 골반이 있으면 정말 예뻐요.
